jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at HomeTown
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
